styling_advice: This casual look keeps the elongating freshness of light tones while adding depth through sage and burgundy accents. The high-waisted jeans and half-tucked ribbed tee create a sharper waistline, improving proportion without feeling formal. Straight-leg denim lengthens a petite frame, while the cropped overshirt adds relaxed structure and balances shoulders and hips. Burgundy accessories echo your auburn hair beautifully, giving the outfit a cohesive focal point.
image_generation_prompt: Full-body fashion studio photograph, medium-long distance, head-to-toe fully visible with no cropping, of a feminine-presenting person with light fair neutral-cool skin, slim petite-to-average balanced frame, short wavy dark auburn burgundy bob with soft bangs. She stands relaxed with one knee slightly bent, shoulders open, hands casually near pockets, gentle confident expression. Outfit: casual fitted ribbed ivory short-sleeve crewneck tee neatly half-tucked into high-waisted light-wash straight-leg ankle jeans with a clean defined waistband, subtle vintage fading, soft structured denim; an unbuttoned cropped sage green cotton-linen utility shirt jacket with relaxed sleeves rolled to the forearms; slim burgundy leather belt matching her hair tone; white low-profile leather sneakers; small silver hoop earrings and a delicate silver chain necklace. Materials visible: ribbed knit cotton, crisp cotton-linen overshirt, matte denim, smooth leather belt and sneakers. Lighting: bright even high-definition studio lighting, soft frontal illumination, natural skin texture, accurate cool-neutral color rendering. Background: solid pure white backdrop only, no props, no gradients, no visible shadow distractions, clean minimal editorial styling.
